## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Imubit and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, website updates, and product developments.](https://fathom.video/share/cxAv_yB8CKRGxHuP1CyBSnpFBAMzv_5a?tab=summary&timestamp=115.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [📉 Slight drop in Engage Sessions due to SERP position change for "Advanced Process Control" article](https://fathom.video/share/cxAv_yB8CKRGxHuP1CyBSnpFBAMzv_5a?tab=summary&timestamp=125.0)
  - [🚀 New articles showing promising CTRs for niche keywords; AI mentions up vs. competitors](https://fathom.video/share/cxAv_yB8CKRGxHuP1CyBSnpFBAMzv_5a?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
  - [🔄 Webflow migration planned (6-week goal); API publishing discussed (security considerations noted)](https://fathom.video/share/cxAv_yB8CKRGxHuP1CyBSnpFBAMzv_5a?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
  - [🆕 New use case: connecting feedstock economics (details pending from director of delivery)](https://fathom.video/share/cxAv_yB8CKRGxHuP1CyBSnpFBAMzv_5a?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)

## Topics
